page_content: RELS170 Ancient Myths and Modern Lives (3 Credits) What are myths and why do we tell them? What powers do myths have? We will tackle these questions by looking at the enduring and fascinating myths from ancient Greece and Rome. In addition to studying how they shaped ancient societies, we will also look at their modern influence and reflect upon the power that myths still hold in our contemporary world. Taught in English. Cross-listed with: CLAS170. Credit Only Granted for: CLAS170 or RELS170. Additional Information: This course cannot be taken for language credit.
